name: dimagi-website
description: Static rebuild of the dimagi.com pre-login site

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -a --exclude='/Context' --exclude='/node_modules' --exclude='/dist' --exclude='/.git' --exclude='/.github' --exclude='/.wrangler' --exclude='/wrangler.jsonc' --exclude='/package.json' --exclude='/package-lock.json' --exclude='/.gitignore' --exclude='.DS_Store' ./ dist/
